title: July 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 11''' is the 192nd day of the year (193rd in leap years), with 173 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s|1966]] – [[Greg Grunberg]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 72|''Star Wars Weekly'' 72]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Paradise Detour]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 56|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 56]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[AJ LoCascio]] is born.
*1987 – [[Cristina Valenzuela]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Dhruv Chanchani]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] published.
*2007 – [[Rebellion 8|''Rebellion'' 8]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Knight Errant: Escape 2|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 2]] published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Crossing Paths]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 18|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 18]] published.
*2018 – [[Thrawn 6|''Thrawn'' 6]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories Volume 1 – Rebels and Resistance]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Tales of the Jedi Vol. 3]]'' published.
<noinclude>
